title: Lesson 24: (Vocab) - こちら, そちら, ただいま...

intro_cards.title: Combination Sounds (Yōon)
intro_cards.body:
Small versions of や, ゆ, よ combine with characters ending in an 'i' sound to form new syllables:

き + ゃ = きゃ (kya)
し + ゅ = しゅ (shu)
ち + ょ = ちょ (cho)

This works with: き, し, ち, に, ひ, み, り — and their dakuten forms (ぎ, じ, び, ぴ).

The small ゃ, ゅ, ょ are written smaller than normal. Each combination counts as one syllable, not two.

items.gloss: have a good day; take care; see you
I'll be back soon; I'm off; see you later; be back soon
